title: Guest post for Paper Crafts Connection
excerpt: Excited to have a guest post up on the Plugged In With Papercrafts & Scrapbooking blog . Hope you'll check it out and enter for a chance to win a Creative Options Medium Grab N Go rack!
body: Excited to have a guest post up on the Plugged In With Papercrafts & Scrapbooking blog. Hope you'll check it out and enter for a chance to win a Creative Options Medium Grab N Go rack!
